testcase.name: spring Spring defined with bounce and duration is same as just bounce

testcase.classname: spring Time-defined spring ignores velocity

testcase.name: spring Critically damped spring with velocity and zero delta is not immediately done

testsuite.name: Spring follow at different frame rates (issue #3265)

testcase.classname: Spring follow at different frame rates (issue #3265) spring position should be consistent at 240hz vs 60hz when following a moving target

testcase.name: mixNumber

testcase.classname: inertia Runs animation

testcase.name: inertia modifyTarget changes calculated target

testcase.classname: inertia Runs animation with min (not encountered)
testcase.name: inertia Runs animation with min (not encountered)

testcase.name: isNear Correctly indicate when the provided value is within maxDistance of the provided target

testcase.classname: calcAxisDelta Correctly calculate the a delta that, when applied to source, will make it the same as target

testcase.classname: calcRelativeBox Resolves relative box from parent.min (default anchor=0)
testcase.name: calcRelativeBox Resolves relative box from parent.min (default anchor=0)

testcase.classname: calcRelativeBox Resolves relative box with anchor={x:0.5,y:0.5}
testcase.name: calcRelativeBox Resolves relative box with anchor={x:0.5,y:0.5}

testcase.classname: calcRelativePosition Calculates relative position from parent.min (default anchor=0)
testcase.name: calcRelativePosition Calculates relative position from parent.min (default anchor=0)

testcase.classname: calcRelativePosition With anchor=0.5, centered child produces offset ~0
testcase.name: calcRelativePosition With anchor=0.5, centered child produces offset ~0

testcase.classname: calcRelativePosition Roundtrip: calcRelativePosition then calcRelativeBox returns original box
testcase.name: calcRelativePosition Roundtrip: calcRelativePosition then calcRelativeBox returns original box

testcase.classname: calcRelativePosition Roundtrip with anchor=0 also works (backward compatible)
testcase.name: calcRelativePosition Roundtrip with anchor=0 also works (backward compatible)

testcase.classname: calcRelativeAxisPosition with anchor anchor=0 is identical to default (parent.min)
testcase.name: calcRelativeAxisPosition with anchor anchor=0 is identical to default (parent.min)

testcase.classname: calcRelativeAxisPosition with anchor anchor=1 measures from parent.max
testcase.name: calcRelativeAxisPosition with anchor anchor=1 measures from parent.max

testcase.classname: calcRelativeAxis with anchor anchor=0 is identical to default (parent.min)
testcase.name: calcRelativeAxis with anchor anchor=0 is identical to default (parent.min)

testcase.classname: calcRelativeAxis with anchor anchor=0.5 resolves from parent center
testcase.name: calcRelativeAxis with anchor anchor=0.5 resolves from parent center

testcase.classname: supportsBrowserAnimation returns true for accelerated values like opacity
testcase.name: supportsBrowserAnimation returns true for accelerated values like opacity

testcase.classname: supportsBrowserAnimation returns false for non-accelerated values without browser-only colors
testcase.name: supportsBrowserAnimation returns false for non-accelerated values without browser-only colors

testcase.classname: supportsBrowserAnimation returns true for color properties with oklch keyframes
testcase.name: supportsBrowserAnimation returns true for color properties with oklch keyframes

testcase.name: supportsBrowserAnimation returns true for color properties with oklab keyframes

testcase.name: supportsBrowserAnimation returns true for color properties with color-mix() keyframes

testcase.classname: supportsBrowserAnimation returns false for non-color properties with oklch keyframes

testcase.classname: supportsBrowserAnimation returns false when onUpdate is set even with browser-only colors
testcase.name: supportsBrowserAnimation returns false when onUpdate is set even with browser-only colors

testcase.classname: buildProjectionTransform Returns 'none' when no transform required
testcase.name: buildProjectionTransform Returns 'none' when no transform required

testcase.classname: buildProjectionTransform Doesn't apply unneccessary translation

testcase.name: canAnimate returns true for valid filter blur keyframes

testcase.classname: canAnimate returns false for bare filter function names without parentheses
testcase.name: canAnimate returns false for bare filter function names without parentheses

testcase.classname: canAnimate returns false when both keyframes are non-animatable

testcase.name: canAnimate returns false when origin keyframe is null

testcase.classname: Unit conversion Correctly factors in padding when measuring width/height
testcase.name: Unit conversion Correctly factors in padding when measuring width/height

testcase.classname: Unit conversion Does not subtract padding when box-sizing is border-box
testcase.name: Unit conversion Does not subtract padding when box-sizing is border-box

testcase.classname: isNone Detects zero/none values
testcase.name: isNone Detects zero/none values

testcase.classname: DocumentProjectionNode measureScroll null body handling accessing document.body?.scrollLeft does not throw when body is null
testcase.name: DocumentProjectionNode measureScroll null body handling accessing document.body?.scrollLeft does not throw when body is null

testcase.classname: DocumentProjectionNode measureScroll null body handling returns 0 when both documentElement and body scroll are 0 or unavailable
testcase.name: DocumentProjectionNode measureScroll null body handling returns 0 when both documentElement and body scroll are 0 or unavailable

testcase.classname: DocumentProjectionNode measureScroll null body handling uses documentElement scroll when available
testcase.name: DocumentProjectionNode measureScroll null body handling uses documentElement scroll when available

testcase.classname: DocumentProjectionNode measureScroll null body handling falls back to body scroll when documentElement scroll is 0
testcase.name: DocumentProjectionNode measureScroll null body handling falls back to body scroll when documentElement scroll is 0

testcase.name: isAnimatable returns true for valid filter blur values

testcase.name: isAnimatable returns true for numeric values

testcase.classname: isAnimatable returns false for non-animatable strings
testcase.name: isAnimatable returns false for non-animatable strings

testcase.name: isSVGSVGElement should return true for an SVGSVGElement

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue change event is type-inferred
testcase.name: SognaflowValue change event is type-inferred

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue change event fires when value changes
testcase.name: SognaflowValue change event fires when value changes

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue Velocity is calculated as zero when value is arbitrarily changed after creation
testcase.name: SognaflowValue Velocity is calculated as zero when value is arbitrarily changed after creation

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is correct when value changes each animation frame
testcase.name: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is correct when value changes each animation frame

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is correct when value changes twice within one frame
testcase.name: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is correct when value changes twice within one frame

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is capped to the last estimated frame when value hasn't been updated in a long time, and is then updated
testcase.name: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is capped to the last estimated frame when value hasn't been updated in a long time, and is then updated

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is capped to the last estimated frame when value hasn't been updated in a long time, and is then updated outside frameloop
testcase.name: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is capped to the last estimated frame when value hasn't been updated in a long time, and is then updated outside frameloop

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is capped to the last estimated frame when value hasn't been updated in a long time, and is then double updated outside frameloop
testcase.name: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is capped to the last estimated frame when value hasn't been updated in a long time, and is then double updated outside frameloop

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is zero when queried a long time after the previous set
testcase.name: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is zero when queried a long time after the previous set

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is correctly calculated after being set with setWithVelocity
testcase.name: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity is correctly calculated after being set with setWithVelocity

testcase.classname: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity can be measured even if initialised with undefined
testcase.name: SognaflowValue velocity calculations Velocity can be measured even if initialised with undefined
